concepts.name: Entity resolution: threshold tuning
concepts.summary: Refine the fuzzy-matcher threshold from a flat edit distance of 3 to a length-relative threshold of max(1, floor(len/4)), plus a shared-token-prefix guard for short names.
reasoning: Chose a length-relative threshold of max(1, floor(len/4)) because short names were collapsing under a fixed threshold of 3.
Rejected a flat threshold of 2 because it hurt recall on long names where 3 edits are reasonable.
Added a shared token prefix guard (len >= 2) as a secondary signal for short names.
This refines the existing entity-resolution concept rather than introducing a new one.
